zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Brailsford於大約1137年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾布拉爾斯福德 格林時，他的父親Nicholas de Brailesford31歲，母親Mrs. Nicholas de Brailesford26歲。他和Cecilia至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1198年在他的家鄉享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brailsford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Midlands and Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in Derbyshire named Brailsford, possibly from an Old English word brægels, a metathesized form of bærgels, itself a byform of byrgels ‘tumulus, barrow’, + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Brailsford was born about 1137, in Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas de Brailesford, was 31 and his mother, Mrs. Nicholas de Brailesford, was 26. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Cecilia. He died in 1198, in his hometown, at the age of 62.

Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Cecilia. Il est décédé en 1198, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Brailsford(이)가 대략 1137년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 브레이스퍼드 그린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Brailesford(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Nicholas de Brailesford(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Cecilia(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1198년 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Cecilia. Он умер в 1198 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет.
